goals.description: Send a direct text to roommate_R explicitly stating that I am cutting off all work-related screen time and physical presence tonight to protect the living space, while confirming my commitment to finishing the reading response by Wednesday morning.
goals.rationale: My affiliation axis demands that I enforce this boundary immediately rather than letting exhaustion bleed into our shared space. Since I already messaged about renegotiating the split-work deadline, sending a clear 'stop' signal now completes the conversation loop without requiring another meeting. This protects the trust we've built with roommate_R by showing I value our agreement more than my temporary comfort, preventing future friction.
